title: rothmannia malleifera
intro: Rothmannia malleifera, also known as the African starflower or the forest star, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rothmannia malleifera include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal properties, and its leaves and flowers can also be used to make a poultice for topical application.
